nasb.text: and to the kings who were of the north in the hill country, and in the Arabah—south of Chinneroth and in the lowland and on the heights of Dor on the west—

esv.text: and to the kings who were in the northern hill country, and in the Arabah south of Chinneroth, and in the lowland, and in Naphoth-dor on the west,

cnv.text: 以及住在北方山地、基尼烈南邊的亞拉巴、高原和西邊多珥高地的眾王，

ccb.text: 还有北方山区、基尼烈南面的亚拉巴、西部丘陵和多珥高原的各王，
